statutes.title: Pakistan Penal Code
statutes.summary_en: The principal criminal law of Pakistan defining offenses and their punishments including offenses against the state, public tranquility, human body, property, and reputation.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان کا بنیادی فوجداری قانون جو جرائم اور ان کی سزاؤں کی وضاحت کرتا ہے۔

statutes.title: Code of Criminal Procedure
statutes.summary_en: Procedural law governing the mechanism for investigation, inquiry, and trial of criminal offenses including provisions for arrest, bail, search, seizure, and appeals.
statutes.summary_ur: طریقہ کار کا قانون جو فوجداری جرائم کی تفتیش، تحقیقات اور مقدمے کی کارروائی کو منظم کرتا ہے۔

statutes.title: Constitution of Pakistan 1973
statutes.summary_en: The supreme law of Pakistan establishing the framework of government, fundamental rights, principles of policy, and distribution of powers between federation and provinces.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان کا سپریم قانون جو حکومت کا ڈھانچہ، بنیادی حقوق اور اختیارات کی تقسیم قائم کرتا ہے۔

statutes.title: Muslim Family Laws Ordinance
statutes.summary_en: Law governing marriage, divorce, maintenance, and inheritance among Muslims in Pakistan. Covers registration of marriages, procedures for talaq, khula, and maintenance rights.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں مسلمانوں کے نکاح، طلاق، نفقہ اور وراثت کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Guardian and Wards Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing guardianship and custody of minors. Defines the rights and responsibilities of guardians, welfare of the child as paramount consideration, and procedures for custody disputes.
statutes.summary_ur: نابالغوں کی سرپرستی اور حضانت کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Transfer of Property Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing the transfer of property between living persons including sale, mortgage, lease, exchange, and gift of immovable property.
statutes.summary_ur: زندہ افراد کے درمیان جائیداد کی منتقلی کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act
statutes.summary_en: Law addressing cyber crimes in Pakistan including unauthorized access, data damage, electronic fraud, cyber terrorism, stalking, spamming, and online harassment.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں سائبر جرائم سے نمٹنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Dissolution of Muslim Marriages Act
statutes.summary_en: Law providing grounds on which a Muslim woman may obtain dissolution of marriage including cruelty, desertion, failure to maintain, impotence, and insanity.
statutes.summary_ur: قانون جو مسلمان عورت کو نکاح ختم کرنے کی بنیادیں فراہم کرتا ہے۔

statutes.title: Income Tax Ordinance
statutes.summary_en: Principal taxation law of Pakistan governing income tax on individuals, companies, and associations of persons. Covers tax computation, returns, assessments, appeals, and penalties.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان کا بنیادی ٹیکس قانون جو انکم ٹیکس کو منظم کرتا ہے۔

statutes.title: Qanun-e-Shahadat Order
statutes.summary_en: The law of evidence in Pakistan governing admissibility, relevance, and weight of evidence in civil and criminal proceedings.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان کا شہادت کا قانون جو شواہد کی قابلیت اور اہمیت کو منظم کرتا ہے۔

statutes.title: Code of Civil Procedure
statutes.summary_en: Procedural law for adjudication of civil disputes. Governs the procedure for filing suits, service of summons, hearings, evidence, judgment, decree, appeals, and execution of decrees.
statutes.summary_ur: دیوانی تنازعات کے فیصلے کے لیے طریقہ کار کا قانون۔

statutes.title: Specific Relief Act
statutes.summary_en: Law providing specific reliefs including recovery of possession of property, specific performance of contracts, rectification and cancellation of instruments, and declaratory decrees.
statutes.summary_ur: قانون جو مخصوص ریلیف فراہم کرتا ہے جیسے جائیداد کی بازیابی اور معاہدوں کی مخصوص تعمیل۔

statutes.title: Limitation Act
statutes.summary_en: Law prescribing the time period within which legal proceedings must be initiated. Specifies limitation periods for different types of suits, appeals, and applications.
statutes.summary_ur: قانون جو قانونی کارروائی شروع کرنے کی مدت مقرر کرتا ہے۔

statutes.title: Contract Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing contracts in Pakistan including formation, performance, breach, and remedies. Covers offer, acceptance, consideration, capacity, free consent, void agreements, and quasi-contracts.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں معاہدوں کو منظم کرنے والا قانون جس میں تشکیل، تعمیل اور خلاف ورزی شامل ہے۔

statutes.title: West Pakistan Family Courts Act
statutes.summary_en: Law establishing Family Courts with exclusive jurisdiction over matrimonial disputes including dissolution of marriage, dower, maintenance, custody, guardianship, and personal property rights.
statutes.summary_ur: فیملی کورٹس قائم کرنے والا قانون جنہیں ازدواجی تنازعات پر خصوصی اختیار حاصل ہے۔

statutes.title: Companies Act
statutes.summary_en: Principal corporate law governing incorporation, management, and winding up of companies in Pakistan. Covers directors' duties, shareholders' rights, meetings, accounts, audit, and corporate governance.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں کمپنیوں کی تشکیل، انتظام اور ختم کرنے کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Partnership Act
statutes.summary_en: Law defining and governing partnerships in Pakistan including formation, rights and duties of partners, dissolution, and settlement of accounts.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں شراکت داری کی تعریف اور نظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan Act
statutes.summary_en: Law establishing the SECP as the regulatory authority for corporate sector and capital markets. Governs regulation of securities market, insurance, non-banking finance companies, and private pensions.
statutes.summary_ur: ایس ای سی پی کو کارپوریٹ سیکٹر اور کیپیٹل مارکیٹ کے ریگولیٹری اتھارٹی کے طور پر قائم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Punjab Pre-emption Act
statutes.summary_en: Law providing the right of pre-emption (Shuf'a) to co-sharers, neighbors, and adjacent property owners when immovable property is sold.
statutes.summary_ur: قانون جو حق شفعہ فراہم کرتا ہے۔

statutes.title: Registration Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing registration of documents relating to immovable property. Makes registration compulsory for certain transactions and prescribes the procedure for registration.
statutes.summary_ur: غیر منقولہ جائیداد سے متعلق دستاویزات کی رجسٹریشن کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Stamp Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing stamp duty on documents and instruments. Prescribes rates of stamp duty payable on various types of instruments including conveyance, mortgage, lease, and power of attorney.
statutes.summary_ur: دستاویزات اور آلات پر سٹیمپ ڈیوٹی کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Land Revenue Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing land revenue administration, maintenance of land records, mutation of property ownership, and resolution of revenue disputes in Punjab.
statutes.summary_ur: زمین کی آمدنی، زمینی ریکارڈ اور مالکانہ حق کی منتقلی کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Negotiable Instruments Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing promissory notes, bills of exchange, and cheques. Covers negotiation, endorsement, discharge, and dishonour of negotiable instruments.
statutes.summary_ur: بیعانہ نوٹ، حوالہ اور چیک کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Financial Institutions (Recovery of Finances) Ordinance
statutes.summary_en: Law establishing Banking Courts for expeditious recovery of finances owed to financial institutions. Provides special procedures for recovery suits and execution proceedings.
statutes.summary_ur: مالیاتی اداروں کے قرضوں کی فوری وصولی کے لیے بینکنگ کورٹس قائم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: State Bank of Pakistan Act
statutes.summary_en: Law establishing the State Bank of Pakistan as the central bank with powers to regulate monetary and credit system, issue currency, and supervise banking sector.
statutes.summary_ur: اسٹیٹ بینک آف پاکستان کو مرکزی بینک کے طور پر قائم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Anti-Terrorism Act
statutes.summary_en: Law for prevention of terrorism, sectarian violence, and other heinous offenses. Establishes Anti-Terrorism Courts with special procedures for speedy trial of terrorism-related cases.
statutes.summary_ur: دہشت گردی، فرقہ وارانہ تشدد اور سنگین جرائم کی روک تھام کا قانون۔

statutes.title: National Accountability Ordinance
statutes.summary_en: Law establishing the National Accountability Bureau (NAB) for investigation and prosecution of corruption, corrupt practices, and recovery of looted national wealth.
statutes.summary_ur: نیب کو کرپشن کی تحقیقات اور مقدمات چلانے کے لیے قائم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Control of Narcotic Substances Act
statutes.summary_en: Law controlling narcotic drugs and psychotropic substances. Defines offenses related to possession, trafficking, and manufacture of narcotics with severe penalties.
statutes.summary_ur: نشہ آور اشیاء اور نفسیاتی مادوں کو کنٹرول کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Pakistan Environmental Protection Act
statutes.summary_en: Law for protection, conservation, rehabilitation, and improvement of the environment. Establishes the Pakistan Environmental Protection Agency and Environmental Tribunals.
statutes.summary_ur: ماحول کے تحفظ، بحالی اور بہتری کے لیے قانون۔

statutes.title: Industrial Relations Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing employer-employee relations, trade unions, collective bargaining, and settlement of industrial disputes. Provides for workers' right to organize and participate in trade union activities.
statutes.summary_ur: آجر اور ملازم کے تعلقات، ٹریڈ یونینز اور صنعتی تنازعات کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Factories Act
statutes.summary_en: Law regulating labor in factories covering working conditions, health, safety, working hours, employment of women and children, annual leave, and overtime.
statutes.summary_ur: فیکٹریوں میں محنت کشوں کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Payment of Wages Act
statutes.summary_en: Law regulating payment of wages to workers employed in factories and industrial establishments. Covers frequency of payment, permissible deductions, and remedies for delayed or unpaid wages.
statutes.summary_ur: فیکٹریوں میں ملازمین کو اجرت کی ادائیگی کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Workmen's Compensation Act
statutes.summary_en: Law providing compensation to workmen for injuries suffered during employment. Covers occupational diseases, permanent and temporary disablement, and death compensation.
statutes.summary_ur: ملازمت کے دوران زخمی ہونے والے مزدوروں کو معاوضہ فراہم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Sales Tax Act
statutes.summary_en: Law imposing sales tax on supply of goods and services. Covers registration, returns, input tax credits, refunds, and penalties for evasion.
statutes.summary_ur: اشیاء اور خدمات کی فراہمی پر سیلز ٹیکس عائد کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Customs Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing import and export of goods, levy of customs duties, prohibitions, smuggling offenses, and customs procedures.
statutes.summary_ur: اشیاء کی درآمد و برآمد اور کسٹمز ڈیوٹی کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Federal Excise Act
statutes.summary_en: Law levying federal excise duty on specified goods produced or manufactured in Pakistan and on services provided or rendered.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں تیار کردہ مخصوص اشیاء پر فیڈرل ایکسائز ڈیوٹی لگانے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Muslim Personal Law (Shariat) Application Act
statutes.summary_en: Law directing application of Muslim Personal Law (Shariat) in matters of inheritance, succession, wills, marriage, dissolution of marriage, dower, maintenance, and guardianship.
statutes.summary_ur: وراثت، نکاح، طلاق، مہر اور نفقہ کے معاملات میں مسلم پرسنل لا (شریعت) کے اطلاق کا قانون۔

statutes.title: Prevention of Anti-Women Practices Act
statutes.summary_en: Law criminalizing practices used against women including depriving women of inheritance, forced marriages, marriages with the Holy Quran, and exchange marriages (watta satta).
statutes.summary_ur: خواتین کے خلاف رسوم و روایات کو جرم قرار دینے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Protection of Women (Criminal Laws Amendment) Act
statutes.summary_en: Law amending the Hudood Ordinances to provide better protection to women in cases of rape, adultery, and fornication. Separates hadd and tazir offenses.
statutes.summary_ur: خواتین کو حدود آرڈیننس میں بہتر تحفظ فراہم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Domestic Violence (Prevention and Protection) Act
statutes.summary_en: Law providing protection to women from domestic violence. Defines domestic violence to include physical, sexual, emotional, and economic abuse. Provides for protection orders and residence orders.
statutes.summary_ur: خواتین کو گھریلو تشدد سے تحفظ فراہم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Right of Access to Information Act
statutes.summary_en: Law providing citizens the right to access information held by public bodies. Establishes the Pakistan Information Commission and procedures for requesting and providing information.
statutes.summary_ur: شہریوں کو سرکاری اداروں کی معلومات تک رسائی کا حق دینے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Juvenile Justice System Act
statutes.summary_en: Law providing a separate criminal justice system for juveniles (persons under 18). Covers juvenile courts, diversion, rehabilitation, and reintegration. Prohibits death penalty for juvenile offenders.
statutes.summary_ur: نوعمروں کے لیے علیحدہ فوجداری نظام انصاف فراہم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Arbitration Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing domestic arbitration in Pakistan. Provides procedures for arbitration agreements, appointment of arbitrators, conduct of proceedings, making of awards, and enforcement.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں ملکی ثالثی کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Recognition and Enforcement (Arbitration Agreements and Foreign Arbitral Awards) Act
statutes.summary_en: Law giving effect to the New York Convention on Recognition and Enforcement of Foreign Arbitral Awards in Pakistan.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں غیر ملکی ثالثی فیصلوں کی شناخت اور نفاذ کا قانون۔

statutes.title: Intellectual Property Organization of Pakistan Act
statutes.summary_en: Law establishing the Intellectual Property Organization of Pakistan for administration and enforcement of intellectual property rights including patents, trademarks, copyrights, and industrial designs.
statutes.summary_ur: دانشورانہ املاک کی انتظامیہ اور نفاذ کے لیے آئی پی او قائم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Copyright Ordinance
statutes.summary_en: Law protecting copyright in literary, dramatic, musical, and artistic works, cinematograph films, and sound recordings. Covers ownership, duration, infringement, and remedies.
statutes.summary_ur: ادبی، ڈرامائی، موسیقی اور فنی تخلیقات کے کاپی رائٹ کا تحفظ کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Trade Marks Ordinance
statutes.summary_en: Law governing registration and protection of trademarks in Pakistan. Covers application, examination, opposition, registration, infringement, and passing off.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں ٹریڈ مارکس کی رجسٹریشن اور تحفظ کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Patents Ordinance
statutes.summary_en: Law governing the grant and protection of patents for inventions in Pakistan. Covers patentability criteria, application procedure, examination, opposition, and compulsory licensing.
statutes.summary_ur: پاکستان میں ایجادات کے لیے پیٹنٹ کی منظوری اور تحفظ کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Consumer Protection Act
statutes.summary_en: Law protecting consumer rights against defective goods and deficient services. Establishes consumer courts and provides remedies for unfair trade practices and misleading advertisements.
statutes.summary_ur: صارفین کے حقوق کا تحفظ کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Competition Act
statutes.summary_en: Law promoting free competition and preventing anti-competitive agreements, abuse of dominant position, and deceptive marketing practices. Establishes the Competition Commission of Pakistan.
statutes.summary_ur: آزاد مقابلے کو فروغ دینے اور اجارہ داری کو روکنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Sindh Rented Premises Ordinance
statutes.summary_en: Law controlling rents and regulating eviction of tenants from rented premises in Sindh. Provides for Rent Controller to adjudicate disputes between landlords and tenants.
statutes.summary_ur: سندھ میں کرایوں کو کنٹرول کرنے اور کرایہ داروں کی بے دخلی کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Punjab Rented Premises Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing tenancy agreements and providing protection to tenants and landlords in Punjab. Establishes Rent Tribunals for adjudication of rent disputes.
statutes.summary_ur: پنجاب میں کرایہ داری کے معاہدوں کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Cooperative Societies Act
statutes.summary_en: Law governing the formation, registration, management, and winding up of cooperative societies for mutual benefit of members.
statutes.summary_ur: تعاونی معاشروں کی تشکیل اور نظم کو منظم کرنے والا قانون۔

statutes.title: Benami Transactions (Prohibition) Act
statutes.summary_en: Law prohibiting benami transactions (property held in fictitious names). Provides for confiscation of benami property and penalties for entering into benami transactions.
statutes.summary_ur: بے نامی لین دین (فرضی ناموں پر جائیداد) پر پابندی لگانے والا قانون۔
